channel.title: Model Context Protocol on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in Model Context Protocol on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Claude Series – Post 7: MCPs - Claude Just Learned To Talk To EVERYTHING!
item.description: Stop copy-pasting between tools! Learn how MCP turns Claude into a fully connected research assistant that can search PubMed, manage GitHub repos, access Google Drive, and interact with your entire research ecosystem - all from one terminal.
